Venture X
Elevated travel rewards designed to take you further
ELEVATED TRAVEL BENEFITS AT A PRICE THAT MAKES SENSE
75,000 Miles
Early Spend Bonus
Earn 75,000 bonus miles once you spend $4,000 on purchases within the first 3 months from account opening. 9
10,000 Miles
Anniversary Bonus

Get 10,000 bonus miles (equal to $100 towards travel) every year, starting on your first anniversary. 10

$300
Annual Travel Credit
Receive a $300 annual credit for bookings through Capital One Travel, where you’ll get our best prices on thousands of options. 11
$120
Global Entry or TSA PreCheck® Credit
Receive up to a $120 credit for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck®. 12
ANNUAL FEE
$395

19.49% - 28.49% variable APR
CREDIT LEVEL
Excellent
See if I'm Pre-Approved
Apply Now

Rewards terms
REWARDS FOR TRAVEL AND BEYOND
Earn double miles on every purchase & even more on every trip
10X
Miles on hotels & rental cars booked through Capital One Travel
5X

Miles on flights and vacation rentals booked through Capital One Travel
 

2X
Miles on all other purchases, every day
Airport Lounges
Lodging
Cars

A MODERN AIRPORT OASIS 

Capital One Lounges

Venture X primary cardholders can enjoy access to Capital One Lounge and Landing locations. 4

Explore Lounges 

GLOBAL LOUNGE ACCESS

Priority Pass™ Lounges

Venture X primary cardholders can enjoy access to 1,300+ participating lounges worldwide from Priority Pass. 4

Explore Lounges 
ACCESS CAPITAL ONE TRAVEL
Elevate every trip with special travel features
Book confidently with
free price drop protection
If you book your flight when we recommend and the price drops within 10 days, you’ll get up to $50 in travel credit for the difference.
If you find a better price,
we’ll match it
Let us know within 24 hours of booking an eligible flight, hotel or rental car and we’ll give you a travel credit for the difference. 
Make your plans more flexible
Add the option to cancel your flight up to 3 hours before your scheduled departure and get most of your booking cost refunded.
Know when to buy
and when to wait
Set a price alert and we’ll watch your flight 24/7 to notify you when prices drop.
VENTURE X INDUSTRY AWARDS 1
NerdWallet

Best Premium Travel Credit Card

The Points Guy

Flexible Rewards Credit Card of the Year

Fortune

Best Premium Travel Card

DINING & ENTERTAINMENT
Capital One Dining
Cardholders enjoy access to exclusive reservations at award-winning restaurants and tickets to unforgettable culinary experiences.
Capital One Entertainment
Cardholders can experience events across music, sports and dining with exclusive access to pre-sales, tickets, and more. Plus earn 5X miles on Capital One Entertainment purchases. 2  
ENHANCE YOUR NEXT ADVENTURE

No Annual Fee1

after you spend $1,500 on purchases in the first 6 months of account opening.2
Apply Now
Get a response in under a minute 
1Important Pricing & Information +
Call to apply +
5%
or
1%Cash Back

Earn 5% cash back on your top eligible spend category each billing cycle up to $500 spent.2

Earn 1% cash back thereafter on all other purchases.2

Plus:​ Earn 4% additional cash back on hotels, car rentals, and attractions booked with Citi Travel.®

$200Cash Back

Earn $200 cash back after you spend $1,500 on purchases in the first 6 months of account opening.2

Plus...

No annual fee1

$0 liability on unauthorized charges

Low Intro APR on Balance Transfers for 18 months

0% Intro APR for 18 months on balance transfers from date of account opening; after that, the variable APR will be 17.49% - 27.49%, based on your creditworthiness.1

Balance Transfers must be completed within 4 months of account opening.

Purchase Rate: 17.49% - 27.49% Variable APR, based on your creditworthiness.1 Balance Transfer Fee: either $5 or 5% of the amount of each transfer, whichever is greater. Intro rate does not apply to purchases. If you transfer a balance, interest will be charged on your purchases unless you pay your entire balance (including balance transfers) by the due date each month.

This offer will be fulfilled as 20,000 ThankYou® Points, which can be redeemed for $200 cash back. 5% eligible categories: Restaurants, gas stations, grocery stores, select travel, select transit, select streaming services, drugstores, home improvement stores, fitness clubs, live entertainment.2 Citi will only issue one Citi Custom Cash® Card account per person. Bonus ThankYou Points are not available if you received a new account bonus for a Citi Custom Cash® Card in the past 48 months or if you converted another Citi credit card account on which you earned a new account bonus in the last 48 months into a Citi Custom Cash® Card.

This offer may not be available if you leave this page. Offers may vary and this offer may not be available in other places where the card is offered.

2Additional Information +
Frequently Asked Questions
CASH BACK CREDIT CARD REWARDS AND PROGRAM DETAILS

Your plans change, and with the Citi Custom Cash® Card, so does the way you earn. No rotating bonus categories to sign up for – as your spending changes each billing cycle, your earn adjusts automatically when you spend in any of the eligible categories.

unlimited cash back on all other purchases.

Credit Cards
>Wells Fargo Autograph® Card
Wells Fargo Autograph® Card

Earn 20,000 bonus points
when you spend $1,000 in purchases in the first 3 months1 – that’s a
$200 cash redemption value

$0 Annual Fee

Important Credit Terms

Apply now

Offers may differ from time to time and depend on the marketing channel, such as phone, email, online, direct mail, or in branch. You must select Apply now to take advantage of this offer.

Earn unlimited 3X points for many ways you keep life in motion2
Restaurants

dining in, take-out, catering,
delivery and more2

Travel

airfare, hotels, car rentals,
cruises and more2

Gas

gas stations and electric
vehicle charging stations2

Transit

subways, ride shares,
parking, tolls and more2

Popular Streaming
Services

content at home or on the go2

Phone Plans

cell phone and
landline providers2

Plus, earn 1X points on other purchases2

Low intro APR for 12 months
0% intro APR for 12 months from account opening on purchases. 18.49%, 24.49% or 28.49% variable APR thereafter.

Important Credit Terms

How will you redeem your rewards points?

Discover all the ways you can be rewarded, including these and more with Wells Fargo Rewards®.

Pay with Rewards

Check out with PayPal, and use your points for all or part of your eligible purchases.3

Redeem for Purchases

Redeem your points toward the cost of a past, eligible purchase.4

Gift Cards

Redeem points for gift cards from over 250 merchants, including e-Gift cards as low as $10.

Redeem to Account

Redeem points as a credit to your account, including eligible Wells Fargo credit card or checking accounts.5

Rewards Points Transfer

Transfer your points directly to select travel loyalty programs, in any amount.6

You can book your next getaway through Wells Fargo Rewards and use your rewards to pay for part or all of your trip.

For additional information on redeeming your credit card rewards, visit wellsfargo.com/rewards

Autograph credit card benefits and features
Cellular Telephone Protection

Up to $600 of cell phone protection against damage or theft. Subject to a $25 deductible.7

Auto Rental Collision Damage Waiver

Pay for rental cars using an eligible card and get reimbursed for covered damage or theft.8

Travel and Emergency Assistance Services

Available for covered Wells Fargo cardholders. Count on emergency assistance while traveling anywhere in the world. To learn more, call 1-800-992-6029. If you are outside the U.S., you can call collect: 1-804-673-1675. 9

Roadside Dispatch®

Available whenever you're in need of a tow - for eligible Wells Fargo cardholders 24/7 with no membership required. To learn more call 1-800-847-2869.10

Emergency Cash Disbursement and Card Replacement

Visa credit cardholders can get an emergency cash advance disbursed or a card replaced with
